records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it! That little thing's a pain to catch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it! That little thing's a pain to catch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it! That little thing's a pain to catch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think I'll just give up?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think I'll just give up?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think I'll just give up?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know how strict the ID checks are in Chamber? I had to pay a fortune just to get my fake identity!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know how strict the ID checks are in Chamber? I had to pay a fortune just to get my fake identity!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know how strict the ID checks are in Chamber? I had to pay a fortune just to get my fake identity!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I go back empty-handed, I'm gonna be sick over this for days...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I go back empty-handed, I'm gonna be sick over this for days...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I go back empty-handed, I'm gonna be sick over this for days...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ugh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ugh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ugh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got you at last.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got you at last.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got you at last.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Get rid of these C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Get rid of these C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Get rid of these C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Actually, no. Leave them as they are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Actually, no. Leave them as they are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Actually, no. Leave them as they are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to extract the Eternium and make up for my losses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to extract the Eternium and make up for my losses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to extract the Eternium and make up for my losses.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8gme.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8gme.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8gme.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It wasn't... me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It wasn't... me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It wasn't... me.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What? Then who else could've
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What? Then who else could've
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What? Then who else could've
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Urgh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Urgh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Urgh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How dare you act so shameless!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How dare you act so shameless!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How dare you act so shameless!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't you the one luring C.O.s here?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't you the one luring C.O.s here?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't you the one luring C.O.s here?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! Why would I do that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! Why would I do that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! Why would I do that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then what's with that... delicious smell coming off you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then what's with that... delicious smell coming off you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then what's with that... delicious smell coming off you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything was fine until you showed up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything was fine until you showed up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything was fine until you showed up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then suddenly, C.O.s started appearing left and right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then suddenly, C.O.s started appearing left and right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then suddenly, C.O.s started appearing left and right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're spreading some kind of scent to attract C.O.s, you devil!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're spreading some kind of scent to attract C.O.s, you devil!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're spreading some kind of scent to attract C.O.s, you devil!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you even talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you even talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you even talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shower every day! If anyone knows how I smell, it's me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shower every day! If anyone knows how I smell, it's me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shower every day! If anyone knows how I smell, it's me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Whatever! You're the one reeking of something delicious, so this is on you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Whatever! You're the one reeking of something delicious, so this is on you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Whatever! You're the one reeking of something delicious, so this is on you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh! The C.O.s...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh! The C.O.s...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh! The C.O.s...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: See? They're all coming straight for you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: See? They're all coming straight for you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: See? They're all coming straight for you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You must be behind what's happening in this mansion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You must be behind what's happening in this mansion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You must be behind what's happening in this mansion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll get to the bottom of this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll get to the bottom of this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll get to the bottom of this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you even trying to figure out?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you even trying to figure out?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you even trying to figure out?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I just got here today!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I just got here today!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I just got here today!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just an ordinary person doing my job!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just an ordinary person doing my job!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just an ordinary person doing my job!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, I don't have time for this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, I don't have time for this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, I don't have time for this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop bothering me and... go away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop bothering me and... go away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop bothering me and... go away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something feels off. I'm getting tired faster than usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something feels off. I'm getting tired faster than usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something feels off. I'm getting tired faster than usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn it. That pervy nun thinks I'm some kind of con now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn it. That pervy nun thinks I'm some kind of con now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn it. That pervy nun thinks I'm some kind of con now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just here to do my job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just here to do my job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just here to do my job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, she better hope I don't catch her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, she better hope I don't catch her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, she better hope I don't catch her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I'll be taking that book and anything else that looks valuable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I'll be taking that book and anything else that looks valuable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I'll be taking that book and anything else that looks valuable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Another C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Another C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Another C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, do I really smell like something they'd want...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, do I really smell like something they'd want...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, do I really smell like something they'd want...?
